records.rationale: Dry run only. LLM was not called.
records.prompt_preview:
Evaluate the following generated travel plan.

Scoring dimensions:
- preference_satisfaction: whether the plan satisfies destination, budget, preferences, pace, and special requirements.
- practicality: whether daily density, route arrangement, hotel placement, and dining choices are realistic.
- grounding_faithfulness: whether attractions, hotels, dining, weather, and coordinates look factual and tool-grounded.
- budget_reasonableness: whether budget fields are internally consistent and reasonable.
- coherence: whether the plan is coherent, specific, and not repetitive.
- overall_quality: overall quality.

Return JSON in this exact shape:
{
  "scores": {
    "preference_satisfaction": 1,
    "practicality": 1,
    "grounding_faithfulness": 1,
    "budget_reasonableness": 1,
    "coherence": 1,
    "overall_quality": 1
  },
  "major_issues": ["issue"],
  "rationale": "short explanation"
}

User request, if available:
{}

TripPlan:
{"trip_title": "桂林山水休闲三日游", "total_budget": {"transport_cost": 300, "dining_cost": 360, "hotel_cost": 600, "attraction_ticket_cost": 240, "total": 1500}, "hotels": [{"name": "桂林中心酒店", "address": "桂林市中心", "location": {"lat": 25.2736, "lng": 110.29}, "price": 300, "rating": 4.6}], "days": [{"day": 1, "theme": "城市初见与夜景", "weather": {"date": "2026-06-01", "day_weather": "晴", "night_weather": "多云", "day_temp": "28", "night_temp": "21"}, "recommended_hotel": {"name": "桂林中心酒店", "address": "桂林市中心", "location": {"lat": 25.2736, "lng": 110.29}, "price": 300, "rating": 4.6}, "attractions": [{"name": "两江四湖", "type": "夜景", "rating": 4.7, "suggested_duration_hours": 2, "description": "适合夜景和轻松游船体验。", "address": "桂林市秀峰区", "location": {"lat": 25.2797, "lng": 110.2902}, "image_urls": [], "ticket_price": 120}], "dinings": [{"name": "桂林米粉店", "address": "桂林市中心", "location": {"lat": 25.274, "lng": 110.291}, "cost_per_person": 30, "rating": 4.5}], "budget": {"transport_cost": 100, "dining_cost": 120, "hotel_cost": 300, "attraction_ticket_cost": 120, "total": 640}}, {"day": 2, "theme": "山水玩水体验", "weather": {"date": "2026-06-02", "day_weather": "多云", "night_weather": "阴", "day_temp": "27", "night_temp": "22"}, "recommended_hotel": {"name": "桂林中心酒店", "address": "桂林市中心", "location": {"lat": 25.2736, "lng": 110.29}, "price": 300, "rating": 4.6}, "attractions": [{"name": "遇龙河", "type": "自然风光", "rating": 4.8, "suggested_duration_hours": 3, "description": "适合竹筏和亲水体验。", "address": "桂林市阳朔县", "location": {"lat": 24.7889, "lng": 110.496}, "image_urls": [], "ticket
